steps.title: Identify the defining contrast
steps.content: The colon reveals the explanation: historians “had so much admiration” but were “far from objective.” The blank describes an attitude combining admiration with bias.

steps.title: Match the word to the meaning
steps.content: Reverence is deep, worshipful admiration — the attitude that makes historians “far from objective” when it's excessive. The other three don't capture admiration-driven bias. That matches choice A — A is correct.
